text:

**Number of such incidents:** **5** — their IDs are PD-400, PD-401, PD-403, PD-411, PD-418.

tool_calls.input: {"code":"(email__send_email {:to \"oncall@acme.io\" :subject \"Triage\" :body (str \"High-urgency triggered incidents requiring triage:\\n\\n\" (clojure.string/join \"\\n\" (map :id incidents)))})\n\n(count incidents)"}
